## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Usman Adepoju's background and potential fit for a Content Manager role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Usman has a strong content writing background with evolving SEO skills, aligning well with growthx.ai's preferred profile](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [growthx.ai uses a pod structure with AI-driven workflows to produce high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [The company is interested in bringing Usman on board as a Content Manager, valuing his experimentation and content approach](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai Team Structure and Content Manager Role

  - [Pod structure: Director overseeing 2 pods, each led by a Managing Editor](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Content Manager responsibilities:](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
      - [Develop content strategy and conduct keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
      - [Manage workflows and iterate on content production processes](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
      - [Collaborate with freelance creators and AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
      - [Focus on producing high-quality, SEO-optimized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)

### Usman's Background and Experience

  - [Current role: Content writer at Speedplay, focusing on conversion, returns, and e-commerce](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Previous freelance experience with 2-3 clients](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Evolved from purely writing-focused to incorporating SEO strategies](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Learned to adapt content for Google core updates and traffic fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [Developed skills in keyword research, topic clustering, and competitive analysis](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)

### AI Usage in Content Creation

  - [Usman experiments with AI tools beyond writing tasks](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Emphasizes providing context and clear instructions to AI](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Uses custom instructions in ChatGPT to prevent repetitive outputs](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Verifies AI-generated facts and data for accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Explores creative AI applications (e.g., comic creation with Amazon KDP)](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)

### growthx.ai's Client Engagement Process

  - [Rapid content production capabilities (7-15 articles/week for editorial, 100+ for programmatic)](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Initial steps:](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
    1.  Automated client brief creation using sales call transcripts
    2.  Kickoff meeting and document review
    3.  Topical cluster alignment using Airtable "Content OS"
    4.  Calibration phase with sample articles and feedback collection
  - [Scaling up content production by week 3-4](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Different approaches for editorial vs. programmatic content review](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

### Industry Knowledge Requirements

  - [Generally not strict about industry-specific knowledge for most roles](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [Some specialized knowledge beneficial for technical or niche fields (e.g., healthcare, education)](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [Emphasis on asking the right questions and effectively tapping into client expertise](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Morley (presumably from HR/recruiting) to reach out to Usman about next steps](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [Usman to consider if the role aligns with his career goals and ask any additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [Potential follow-up discussions to determine fit and role specifics](https://fathom.video/share/rXYokxsy2-RpxxGLenZakptxzyRMrzfs?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
